prediction.reasoning: Based on ADBE's historical volatility of approximately 30-35% annually, I estimated an 18-day standard deviation of about 3.2%. The point estimate assumes minimal drift with slight upward bias typical for large tech stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution, with the 18-day period representing roughly 7% of a trading year. ADBE's relatively stable business model and market position support these moderate volatility assumptions.
